subject: Re:
body:
he told me nat is coming with sasha,,,, if not ,,,ok
go give him a ride...larry should arrive here the
morning of the 2 , so if necessry he can pick you both
up at st thomas... or if you want you can fly the heli

--- Gmax <gmax1@mindspring.com> wrote:

> Asked Mandelson how he is getting to the island - he
> sd I hope JE is sending the chopper...so I take it
> you want me to give him a ride on the plane - plse
> let me know so I/Sarah has time to organise it -
> mandelson has to get to st martin ...I am in or will
> be coming from Anquilla..
> 
> G
>
